case_title: EMLEY MICHAEL DBA INFORMATION RESOURCE CENTER VS MCCARNEY DEIRDRE DBA PACIFIC MORTGAGE PARTNERS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $757.17 FILED BY EMLEY MICHAEL DBA INFORMATION RESOURCE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARNEY DEIRDRE DBA PACIFIC MORTGAGE PARTNERS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-19-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF OCT-31-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARNEY DEIRDRE DBA PACIFIC MORTGAGE PARTNERS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMLEY MICHAEL DBA INFORMATION RESOURCE CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARNEY DEIRDRE DBA PACIFIC MORTGAGE PARTNERS. $757.17 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $777.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCARNEY DEIRDRE DBA PACIFIC MORTGAGE PARTNERS. HEARING SET FOR JUL-12-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-12-1996, GRANTED
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT TO EMLEY MICHAEL DBA INFORMATION RESOURCE CENTER RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO EMLEY MICHAEL DBA INFORMATION RESOURCE CENTER RETURNED TO SENDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMLEY MICHAEL DBA INFORMATION RESOURCE CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCARNEY DEIRDRE DBA PACIFIC MORTGAGE PARTNERS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO EMLEY MICHAEL RETUR NED, LEFT NO ADRESS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-19-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-02-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
